summary: Rank-bearing fields in mergeClusters (CurrentRank, PeakRank, PreviousRank, Delta) gate on accumulator==0 so first-non-zero-wins, instead of always overwriting on incoming non-zero.
reason: Digg's /ai RSC stream emits the same clusterId in multiple sections (main leaderboard array, plus featured / weekly / pinned / sevenDaysStories blocks). The previous last-wins merge let secondary sections' rank=1 stamp the cluster's currentRank, displacing the live leaderboard rank. Symptom: `digg-pp-cli top` returned 7 distinct stories all stamped currentRank=1 and Karpathy pinned at rank 1 for 4+ days.
validated_outcome: TestMergeClustersFirstWinsForRankFields pins the fix against a real two-occurrence fixture; TestMergeClustersStillGapFillsZeroAccumulator and TestExtractClustersDedup confirm sparse-then-full enrichment still works; TestMergeClustersDistinctClustersPreserveOwnRanks confirms distinct clusters keep their own ranks.
